mapper.select: SELECT id, pre_processing_steps_name, display_order, is_active, description, created_at, updated_at, steps, process FROM pre_processing_steps_options WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY display_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, pre_processing_steps_name, display_order, is_active, description, created_at, updated_at, steps, process FROM pre_processing_steps_options WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, pre_processing_steps_name, display_order, is_active, description, created_at, updated_at, steps, process FROM pre_processing_steps_options ORDER BY display_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pre_processing_steps_options ( pre_processing_steps_name, display_order, is_active, description, created_at, updated_at, steps, process ) VALUES ( #{preProcessingStepsName}, #{displayOrder}, #{isActive}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{steps}, #{process} )
mapper.update: UPDATE pre_processing_steps_options SET pre_processing_steps_name = #{preProcessingStepsName}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, is_active = #{isActive}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, steps = #{steps}, process = #{process} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, pre_processing_steps_name, display_order, is_active, description, created_at, updated_at, steps, process FROM pre_processing_steps_options WHERE process = #{process} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, pre_processing_steps_name, display_order, is_active, description, created_at, updated_at, steps, process FROM pre_processing_steps_options WHERE pre_processing_steps_name = #{preProcessingStepsName} LIMIT 1
